subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enkindled by the fire which blazes in the tree of the Covenant! Arise and like a flame of fire
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مشتعل بنار موقده در سدره میثاق برخیز و چون نار موقده در قطب آفاق شعله زن و
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @prayer for teaching, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
